title: hieracium saxifragum subsp. oreades
intro: Hieracium saxifragum subsp. oreades, a lesser-known species within the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion-like hawkweed family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium saxifragum subsp. oreades include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
